testcase.name: test_seed_question_pool_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration62_autopilot.py:160: in test_seed_question_pool_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Seed endpoint failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Seed endpoint failed: 500 - {"error":"INTERNAL_ERROR","message":"An unexpected error occurred","details":{}} E assert 500 in [200, 201] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_per_match_auto_templates_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration62_autopilot.py:244: in test_per_match_auto_templates_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Per-match auto templates failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Per-match auto templates failed: 400 - {"detail":"Need at least 50 questions in pool. Currently have 19. Run seed-question-pool first."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
